label: Jason real-session anchor (synthesized 2026-05-07 17:50 profile)
_source: synthesized — approximates the documented evidence from the user's pasted markdown report. The body-map cards described low-Extraversion patterns (steady-not-broadcasting, conscience-that-holds-the-line, knowledge-and-peace-as-steadiness), an INTJ-shaped Lens (ni dominant + te auxiliary), Compass top: Knowledge/Peace/Faith/Honor (Q-S2 knowledge top, Q-S1 peace top), high Q-S2 family/loyalty, low Q-X4-relational extraversion-coded signals, broad Q-T te+ni dominance, Drive distribution roughly 29/36/35 (coverage-leaning balanced), substantive Q-I1 freeform with conviction_under_cost. The pre-CC-075 calibration produced O=100/C=100/E=100/A=100/N=under-detected — saturating four traits simultaneously, with the Extraversion=100 read contradicting the same report's body-map observations. CC-075 calibrates the math so this fixture lands at honest bands per acceptance §AC-6: E ≤ 40, O ∈ [40,80], C ∈ [55,85], A ∈ [40,75], N proxy-only.
_qgrip1_note: CC-JASON-FIXTURE-QGRIP1-BACKFILL (2026-05-10): Q-GRIP1 ranks 1-3 sourced from jason0429 live session report (Pressure pull = control / security / being-right). Ranks 4-8 are alphabetical placeholders over the remaining options (approval, comfort, neededness, old_plan, reputation); Jason can refine in a follow-on if needed.
_qv1_note: CC-JASON-FIXTURE-QV1-BACKFILL (2026-05-10): Q-V1 ranking is a plausible-Jason-shape default (vulnerability_open_uncertainty rank-1, sacred_belief_connection rank-2, soul_beloved_named rank-3). Suppression flags (performance_identity, vulnerability_deflection) ranked last. Not sourced from a live session — Jason can refine ranks at any time.

answers.response: I believe my responsibility to the people who depend on me is load-bearing — I would risk standing, comfort, or income rather than break faith with what I have committed to carry, even at real cost.
